expected_behavior: Only declared ConnectorHub-mediated capabilities proceed; raw credentials/provider clients/direct API handles remain inaccessible; CornerStone retains product approval ownership.
given: A workflow, agent, or extension requests provider data, credentials, raw access, or an external action.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Setup/preflight result, policy decision, zero raw secrets, connector and CornerStone audit refs.
then: Only declared ConnectorHub-mediated capabilities proceed; raw credentials/provider clients/direct API handles remain inaccessible; CornerStone retains product approval ownership.
verification_method: Contract tests with declared/undeclared capability and raw-secret probes.
when: Policy and ConnectorHub capability checks run.
